title: triticum montanum
intro: Triticum montanum, also known as wild einkorn, is a type of ancient grain belonging to the wheat family, characterized by its single grain per ear and high nutritional value. The medicinal properties of Triticum montanum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming this plant include improved digestion, reduced blood sugar levels, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Triticum montanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, flour, or supplement, and its seeds can be sprouted for added nutrition.
